input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.1.5 tests use org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps, which are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 after deprecated API removal; adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 will not restore those old classes because that module exposes org.apache.pekko.actor.typed APIs.

If tests intentionally exercise Java serialization, they should enable it in the ActorSystem config string, for example pekko.actor.allow-java-serialization = on, but this is ordinary test-code configuration rather than external setup.

If tests intentionally exercise internal DNS or virtual-thread internals, local JVM/module flags may be needed, but those are optional coverage areas and not prerequisites for meaningful actor coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: pekko-actor_2.13 is the core classic actor artifact, its POM only adds scala-library and typesafe config transitively, and meaningful coverage is reachable with ActorSystem, Props, actors, serialization, reflection, and in-test Config without Docker, environment variables, or additional Maven dependencies.
